name: Nichols and May
blurb: Nichols and May were the American improvisational comedy duo of Mike Nichols and Elaine May, who met at the University of Chicago and honed their craft with the Compass Players.
bio: Nichols and May were the American improvisational comedy duo of Mike Nichols and Elaine May, who met at the University of Chicago and honed their craft with the Compass Players. Their witty, character-driven sketches and three Top 40 albums between 1959 and 1962 helped bring improvisation into the mainstream before each went on to a major directing and writing career.

timeline.ev: Began performing together after the Compass Players
Opened the Broadway show An Evening with Mike Nichols and Elaine May
Won the Grammy for Best Comedy Performance
Disbanded the act to pursue separate careers

accolades: Grammy Award for Best Comedy Performance
Three comedy albums reached the Billboard Top 40

specials.t: An Evening with Mike Nichols and Elaine May
